title: Clarify live card semantics for side, lifecycle, price, and equity
objective: Make live position cards semantically clear without changing strategy or backend math, so users can distinguish held side, lifecycle status, P/L state, and game state immediately.
acceptance_criteria: user can instantly tell held side/outcome
lifecycle status is separate from held side
P/L state is separate from held side
current price / unrealized / live equity are semantically aligned
